title: Crosshair Addons Public
description: Provides helpful icons around the crosshair when certain conditions are met.
body:
Crosshair Addons - Public Version!

This mod adds additional icons around the crosshair when certain conditions are met, such as if the player is wearing an elytra. --- ### Information: **Elytra Indicator** Displays a mini elytra icon beneath the crosshair to indicate when you're equipped with an elytra. ![Elytra Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74593ac59f8725747ccbeef3f9b398d7565dfecc.png) --- **Rocket Indicator** Displays a rocket indicator to show the duration of a firework rocket. ![Rocket Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82826f877642e334f4274d685b53218908cc5904.png) --- **Projectile Hitmarkers** Displays a hitmarker when a player is struck by a projectile you shot, such as an arrow from a bow or crossbow. ![Hitmarker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d6851586dfdba619f9d7a19620fb87a6d1c9de.gif) ![Hitmarker IMG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9360f9a2ac01a48fc244829fd1cbba5c269f41c.png) --- **Player & Mob Indicator** Displays a visual indicator when you're within range and targeting another player or hostile entity ![Player Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0a8fa6d3af134e9188ff86dc2214d310fcb74a7.png) --- **Config Screen** ![Config Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f699d1a250f2304950bd0725e862e3dc12aa1a4.png) --- **Credits** - Mod: Walksy - Player Indicator: Selyss -> [Original Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshair-indicator) + [Source](https://github.com/Selyss/CrosshairIndicator) - Icon: SakuraFX - Elytra & Firework Indicator Idea: SakuraFX ****
